DatasetTitle: GENERAL HEALTH BY PROVISION OF UNPAID CARE BY AGE BY SEX
Annotations: 1. General health refers to health over the 12 months prior to Census day (27 March 2011).; 2. 'Provision of unpaid care' - the term 'care' covers any unpaid help or support to family members, friends, neightbours or others because of long-term physical or mental ill-health or disability, or problems related to old age.; 3. 'Age' is age at last birthday.;
